name: tony-koop
description: Tony Koop's skill marketplace. Three first-class plugins: 'maker' for physical-world design and personal practice; 'coding' for software/engineering operations; 'studiopipeline' for the StudioPipeline hardware-engineering / dogfood workflow (canonical source in the standalone tonykoop/StudioPipeline repo). Auto-updates from the claude-skills git repo.

plugins.name: maker
plugins.description: Physical-world design and personal practice: instrument-maker, sheet-metal, maker-engineering, makerspace, laser-art, habitat-maker, reverse-engineer, sheet-music, yoga-sequencer, playlist-builder, idea-incubator, file-a-patent.

plugins.name: coding
plugins.description: Engineering operations and developer tooling: tmux-sprint, sprint-supervisor, sprint-update, merge-review, run-swarm, ci-triage, gh-fix-ci, source-citations, scaffold-hygiene, disk-cleanup, skills-meta.

plugins.name: studiopipeline
plugins.description: StudioPipeline hardware-engineering / dogfood workflow (MakerBench, hwe). Canonical source lives in the standalone tonykoop/StudioPipeline repo; this marketplace references it, mirroring how the maker plugin treats the standalone instrument-maker and makerspace repos. Skills are authored in that repo, not here.
